header.title: Earth Insights
landing.hero.title: Turn Satellite Data into Actionable Insights
landing.hero.subtitle: Upload ground truth data, analyze environmental metrics, and visualize change — all in one powerful dashboard.
landing.features.title: Powerful Analysis at Your Fingertips
landing.features.subtitle: From vegetation health to urban expansion, get the data you need to make informed decisions.
landing.features.coordinateInputDesc: Enter lat/long to analyze any region on Earth.
landing.features.metricComputationDesc: Calculate key spectral indices like NDVI, NDWI, and NDBI.
landing.features.interactiveVisualsDesc: Time-series charts and satellite vs. ground truth scatter plots.
landing.features.exportEasilyDesc: Download your computed metrics in CSV format for research.
landing.whyUs.title: The Ultimate Environmental Data Platform
landing.whyUs.subtitle: We provide a seamless bridge between complex satellite imagery and clear, actionable environmental intelligence.
landing.whyUs.point1: Built on Google Earth Engine for robust, scalable analysis.
landing.whyUs.point2: Accurate, fast environmental insights to power your research.
landing.whyUs.point3: User-friendly and powerful visualization for intuitive data exploration.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or want to work with us? Fill out the form below.
contact.name: Name
contact.submitted.title: Thank You!
contact.submitted.description: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Earth Insights. All rights reserved. | Team: LunarX
predict.title: Predictive Insights
predict.description: Get AI-powered predictions for your location. Start by entering a location description or coordinates.
predict.weather.title: Weather Forecast
predict.weather.description: Get the current weather and a 24-hour forecast.
predict.crop.title: Crop Planning
predict.crop.description: Receive recommendations on suitable crops and planting schedules.
predict.irrigation.title: Irrigation Schedule
predict.irrigation.description: Get AI-based advice on when and how much to water your fields.
predict.soil.title: Soil Moisture
predict.soil.description: Predict the current volumetric water content in the soil.
predict.yield.title: Crop Yield
predict.yield.description: Forecast potential crop yield for the selected location.
predict.risk.title: Drought & Flood Risk
predict.risk.description: Assess the drought and flood risk based on historical data.
predict.scenario.title: What-If Scenario Analysis
predict.scenario.description: Describe a hypothetical environmental change to see the AI's analysis of its potential impact.
predict.scenario.placeholder: e.g., 'What would happen if annual rainfall increased by 15%?' or 'Impact of a sustained 2-degree Celsius temperature rise on local corn crops.'

predict.error.aiError.title: AI Error

predict.error.predictionError.title: Prediction Error

predict.result.yield.title: Crop Yield Forecast
predict.result.risk.title: Drought & Flood Risk Assessment
predict.result.scenario.title: Scenario Analysis Result

dashboard.input.description: Specify coordinates, date range, and optional ground truth data to compute environmental metrics.

dashboard.error.invalidCoords.title: Invalid Coordinates

dashboard.error.noDate.description: Please select a valid date range.

dashboard.history.description: Select a past computation to reload its settings.
dashboard.history.toast.title: Loaded from history

dashboard.csv.error.parse: Failed to parse CSV file. Please check the format.

dashboard.welcome.title: Welcome to Earth Insights
dashboard.welcome.description: Enter coordinates or a location description above and select a date range to begin your analysis.
dashboard.compute.success.title: Success
dashboard.compute.success.description: Metrics and land cover analysis complete.
dashboard.compute.failure: Could not compute metrics. Please check your inputs and try again.
dashboard.weather.title: Weather
dashboard.landCover.title: Land Cover Change Analysis
dashboard.landCover.description: Area statistics and visualization for different land cover types at the start and end of the selected period.
dashboard.metrics.title: Computed Metrics
dashboard.metrics.description: Detailed metrics including spectral indices, bands, and land cover statistics.
dashboard.metrics.table.insightPlacehold: Click the magic wand to generate an AI insight for this metric.
dashboard.viz.title: Data Visualization
dashboard.viz.description: Interactive plots of environmental metrics and spectral bands.
dashboard.viz.comparisonDescription: Comparison of Satellite NDVI vs. Ground Truth Data
dashboard.video.error.title: Video Generation Failed
dashboard.video.error.description: Could not generate the time-lapse video.
dashboard.video.modal.title: {metric} Time-Lapse
dashboard.video.modal.description: A generated video showing the change in {metric} over {location}.

settings.description: Manage your preferences and application settings.

settings.satelliteAlerts.description: Receive a notification before a satellite passes over your location.

cropAdvisor.title: AI Crop Advisor
cropAdvisor.description: Fill in your farm's location and climate to get data-driven crop recommendations. Soil and moisture data will be fetched automatically.
cropAdvisor.currentCrop.label: Current or Previous Crop (Optional)
cropAdvisor.climate.label: Local Climate Description
cropAdvisor.climate.placeholder: Describe the typical weather, e.g., 'Temperate with four seasons'
cropAdvisor.toast.success.title: Suggestion Generated
cropAdvisor.toast.advancedSuccess.title: Advanced Advice Generated
cropAdvisor.result.title: AI Suggestion
cropAdvisor.result.description: Based on your input and real-time satellite data, here is our suggestion.
cropAdvisor.result.alternativeDesc: Another good option for your conditions could be {crop}.
cropAdvisor.error.noCropSelected.title: No Crop Selected
cropAdvisor.error.noCropSelected.descrip: Please select a crop to get advanced advice.
cropAdvisor.advanced.title: Get Advanced Crop-Specific Advice
cropAdvisor.advanced.description: Select a crop to receive detailed recommendations on planting density, fertilization, and pest control.
cropAdvisor.advanced.result.title: Advanced Advice for {crop}
